creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178256
patch to update misc/wmweather+ from 2.15 to 2.16

misc/wmweather+ 2.15 was disfunctional for some weeks now, because of a change in the weather data sources (METAR data format).

With the update to version 2.16, the port should be fully functional again.


The patch was tested on Poudriere (10.3i/a, 11.0i/a  and, HEADi/a, with options all enabled, all disabled and default).

portlint -AC seems happy.
